data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for one default value per set.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'One default value per set', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding this specific requirement. The prior steps focus on creating resources and handling bookings, but they do not address the specific requirement of validating the default values in the status vocabulary as outlined in the use case. Therefore, the validation cannot be conclusively determined as either satisfied or unsatisfied.
gaps: No evidence of validation for one default value per set.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of one default value per set.
